payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Dark brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular center panel and visible wood-grain veneer; a slim vertical metal pull is near the right edge and a narrow horizontal slot/gap is visible near the top; the left edge is partially occluded by a pale object at the crop border; appears to be an interior door-like cabinet roughly 1.0 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"dark brown wooden cabinet door","long_description":"Dark brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular center panel and visible wood-grain veneer; a slim vertical metal pull is near the right edge and a narrow horizontal slot/gap is visible near the top; the left edge is partially occluded by a pale object at the crop border; appears to be an interior door-like cabinet roughly 1.0 m from the camera.","attributes":["dark brown","wood veneer","matte finish","recessed rectangular panel","slim vertical metal pull (right)","narrow horizontal slot (top)","left-side partial occlusion","interior door proportions"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.0}
